name: Reward-Free Evolving Agents via Pairwise Validator
summary: arXiv:2607.14408v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A self-evolving agentic loop repeatedly proposes a tweaked version of an agent (its prompt template or program) and accepts or rejects the change bas...
description: arXiv:2607.14408v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A self-evolving agentic loop repeatedly proposes a tweaked version of an agent (its prompt template or program) and accepts or rejects the change based on a per-iteration quality signal. Designing that signal is often the costly part of the project: a reliable scalar reward requires domain expertise and labeled examples that are themselves as expe...
author: Minghao Liu, Yu Wang, Jiayun Wang, Wei Wei
